data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a full audit trail for who delegated what and when. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the audit trail of delegation actions. The linked use case mentions the need for an audit trail, but there is no concrete evidence or API reads that demonstrate this requirement has been satisfied in the current saga run, indicating a clear gap in coverage.
gaps: No evidence of an audit trail for delegation actions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
